news.paragraph: Microsoft is seeing significant strategic momentum through a revised OpenAI deal that Wedbush analysts suggest strengthens its AI position. This comes alongside reports that the company generates $30 billion from OpenAI-related business. However, traders should weigh these developments against caution from Stifel and legal challenges currently facing OpenAI.
headlines: MSFT, DELL And Intel: Which Is The Better Buy
This is Why Stifel is Cautious on Microsoft Corporation (MSFT), A Top Tech Stock in Louis Navellier’s Portfolio
Market Chatter: Microsoft Generates $30 Billion From OpenAI-Related Business, More Than Doubling Investment
Market Chatter: OpenAI Hit With Suit Alleging ChatGPT Culpability in Overdose
Microsoft's Revised OpenAI Deal Strengthens AI Strategy, Wedbush Securities Says
Microsoft secures structural wins in OpenAI revenue cap deal, Wedbush says
